steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which choice from the notes best supports Browner's claim. Supporting evidence must show concrete proof that Ballard's compositions actually incorporate Native musical elements — not just restate the claim.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: restates the claim without providing a specific example from the notes. ✗
  • Choice B: the Washington Festival Suite incorporates a Pueblo log drum — concrete evidence that a specific composition relies on traditional Native musical elements. This directly affirms Browner's claim. ✓
  • Choice C: lacks the specific evidence of Native musical incorporation needed to support the claim. ✗
  • Choice D: is factually inaccurate based on the notes and does not support the claim. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
